response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptionally experienced and capable software engineer with 20+ years in the industry, this role requires active C++ expertise and industrial/embedded systems knowledge that are not present in this resume. His background is primarily web and full-stack development, with last significant C++ work 18 years ago (2007–2008). The role demands immediate contributions to secure, high-performance C++ systems in industrial automation—a significant domain shift from web platforms and geospatial applications. The absence of any security standards knowledge (SDL, IEC 62443), industrial protocols, or IoT development suggests a steeper learning curve than this mid-senior position would accommodate.
strengths: Extensive 20+ years of software development experience with multiple senior/staff roles demonstrating proven seniority and architectural thinking
Strong track record with high-performance and real-time systems (Dunnhumby: low-latency apps handling millions of requests/second, async I/O optimization)
Excellent current expertise in React and Node.js (explicitly advantageous), plus proven ability to master multiple languages and technical domains
concerns: C++ expertise is outdated (last significant C++ work 2007–2008); role requires current, deep C++ and STL proficiency for immediate contributions
Career entirely in web/full-stack and geospatial domains with zero evidence of industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT development, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA)
No demonstrated knowledge of security standards (SDL, IEC 62443), secure development lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity practices—core competencies for the role
